zh.lifeSummary: Sneakoll de Gunn of Strathnaver於1200年出生在英國蘇格蘭奧可尼。他至少有2個女兒。他去世於1230年在他的家鄉享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sneakoll de Gunn of Strathnaver于1200年出生在英国苏格兰奧可尼。他至少有2个女儿。他去世于1230年在他的家乡享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gunn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Old Norse personal name Gunnr (based on a word meaning ‘battle’), or perhaps from Gunne, a pet form of the Old Norse female personal name Gunnhildr (see Gunnell ).
History: This is the name of a Scottish clan or family associated principally with Caithness and Sutherland. It claims descent from a certain Gunni or Guinn who lived in the 12th century.

variants.name: Gunnell
meanings: English: from the Middle English female personal name Gunnild (Old Norse Gunnhildr), from gunnr + hildr, both elements meaning ‘battle’. This was a popular name in those parts of England that were under Scandinavian influence in the Middle Ages.
Irish (Tipperary): shortened Anglicized form of Mag Congail, a Donegal name more often Anglicized as McGonigle .
Americanized form of German Günnel: from a short form of the ancient Germanic personal names Gundram (see Gundrum) or Gundlach .

variants.name: Gunnett
meanings: English (Middlesex): from the Middle English female personal name Gunnot, a diminutive of Gunne (see Gunn ).

variants.name: Gunnison
meanings: English (northern): metronymic from the female personal name Gunne (see Gunn ).

variants.name: Gunson
meanings: English (northern): patronymic name for a ‘son of Gunn’, from the Middle English personal name Gunn + -son.

variants.name: Gunton
meanings: English (southeastern): habitational name from either of two places in East Anglia, one in Norfolk and the other in Suffolk, both named with the Old Norse personal name Gunni (see Gunn 1) + Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.
Korean: variant of   O  .
Japanese: variant of Ō (see O ).

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

en.lifeSummary: Sneakoll de Gunn of Strathnaver was born in 1200, in Orkney, Scotland, United Kingdom. He had at least 2 daughters. He died in 1230, in his hometown, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Sneakoll de Gunn of Strathnaver est né en 1200, à Orkney, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Il a eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1230, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sneakoll de Gunn of Strathnaver wurde 1200 in Orkney, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren. Er hatte mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb 1230 im Alter von 30 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Sneakoll de Gunn of Strathnaver è nato il nel 1200 nel Orkney, Scozia, Regno Unito. Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1230, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.Orkney Islands, Scotland: イギリススコットランドオルクニー
ja.lifeSummary: Sneakoll de Gunn of Strathnaverは1200年にイギリススコットランドオルクニーで生まれた。彼は少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1230年に故郷で30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sneakoll de Gunn of Strathnaver(은)는 1200년 영국 스코틀랜드 르니에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1230년 그의 고향에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sneakoll de Gunn of Strathnaver nasceu em 1200, em Orkney, Escócia, United Kingdom. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1230, em sua cidade natal, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sneakoll de Gunn of Strathnaver родился в 1200 г. в местности орни, Шотландия, Великобритания. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер в 1230 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sneakoll de Gunn of Strathnaver nació en 1200, en Orkney, Escocia, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1230, en su pueblo, a la edad de 30 años.
